findings.summary: SG-1 BLOCKER: Dangling IPC channel get-desktop-plugin-config — preload bridge + type decl + renderer consumer exist but ipcMain.handle missing in main/ipc.ts
SG-2: PluginKind does not include 'desktop' — desktop plugins bypass the entire resolution/install pipeline in opencode package
Desktop plugin infra complete: DesktopPluginProvider, DesktopPluginLoader, desktop.ts types, export map entry. All dirty/untracked.
No plugin management UI exists — no browser, installer, or config panel. Reference pattern: DialogSelectMcp CRUD (411 lines).

Electron-store pattern well-established: 6 generic CRUD channels + 2 dedicated typed stores (MCP servers, custom agents). New plugin store should follow dedicated channel pattern with produce_fragment.
No test infrastructure for plugin system exists.
